citation: Singapore Code of Advertising Practice — Rule 3 (Comparisons)
summary: Comparative and superiority claims must be fair, identifiable, and substantiated before publication.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Versus, better-than, leading, or ranked superiority claims. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation file or soften claim. CHECK: Named competitors, test methods, and sample sizes cited. ESCALATE IF: Unidentifiable competitor or unsubstantiated head-to-head data.
